raw.subject: Your Chico page caught my eye, K C Nails ( Appointment appreciated)
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the energy of your Chico page - the way you're always open and ready to serve. 

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving some potential customers wondering how to book appointments or find your hours.

I took a look at your Facebook posts and photos, and I thought I'd sketch out a simple homepage idea that might help you showcase your services and booking process. I included a services menu, a work gallery, and a clear call-to-action to book an appointment. Take a look:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/k-c-nails-appointment-appreciated-chico

This is just a starting point, but I think it could be a great foundation for your online presence. Building it out would be a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. If you're interested in discussing details, feel free to reply or let's schedule a quick call.
